title: Paper Mario Sticker Star - Boo Night Fever
description:
I took the file that Steven Troya uploaded and extended it to run for four cycles, since the game's Music Exhibition Room is lame.  Hopefully this is long enough to satisfy most viewers.

DISCLAIMER: IGN DID NOT make the picture used in this video; I found the background image on Google Images, which seems to have been taken from a trailer hosted on IGN's website, and overlaid the Boo picture over it.  I do not claim ownership to any of the material used in this video.
